opportunities.title: Epic 公布虚幻引擎 6，首个展示游戏是《Rocket League》
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察事实是Epic正式披露UE6并确认一款在线运营大作将从UE3直升UE6，意味着引擎与内容管线将出现代际迁移窗口与生态关注度提升；但未披露UE6发布时间、功能边界、性能/成本变化或开发者可用性细节，因此市场与技术条件变化的确定性有限。

opportunities.title: Microsoft Copilot Cowork Exfiltrates Files
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable evidence of active community attention and a credible class of vulnerabilities affecting widely deployed enterprise AI tooling, implying materially elevated security/compliance risk and potential changes to rollout, hardening, or policy requirements; no clear vendor-side fix or capability change is evidenced in the provided text.

opportunities.title: The Financial Times has published an article about Heretic
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signals include major-media validation, explicit claim of <10-minute guardrail removal, and large reported adoption metrics (3,500 modified models; 13M downloads), alongside discussion of takedowns/press inquiries indicating increased legal and governance pressure around model modification.

opportunities.title: NuExtract3 released: open-weight 4B VLM for Markdown, OCR and structured extraction (self-hostable)
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable capability/access shift: an Apache-2.0, self-hostable 4B document-extraction VLM with low VRAM claims (~4GB noted by commenters), plus immediate GGUF/MLX distribution and a free no-signup demo; engagement and comments show active evaluation as a lower-cost alternative to paid OCR/VLM services.

opportunities.title: 非生非死：离体人脑被用于药物测试
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察到的技术信号是：离体捐献人脑在死亡数小时后被恢复部分代谢与细胞活动并用于药物测试，意味着疾病机制研究与药物筛选的实验模型能力边界可能改变；但报道同时强调未恢复意识、且伦理/监管不确定性较高，落地速度与规模仍不明。

opportunities.title: MiniCPM5-1B
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable capability shift: 131k context on a ~1B model lowers cost/latency for long-context tasks and enables new deployment patterns (local router in front of larger models); distribution/access is clear via Hugging Face and community interest is evidenced by high Reddit engagement.

opportunities.title: 人工智能时代网络安全专家需求激增
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察到的市场信号明确：网络安全招聘量同比增长11%、高管需求短期内提升5-7倍、部分公司因人手不足拒绝接单且薪酬包上探至数百万美元，显示需求与定价显著变化并指向“AI+安全”复合技能的岗位结构调整。

opportunities.title: 欧盟初步调查：谷歌涉嫌操纵搜索结果违反《数字市场法》  欧盟委员会初步调查结果显示，Alphabet涉嫌违反《数字市场法》（DMA），主要问题集中在搜索引擎和P
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察到的事实是欧盟监管已进入“初步调查结论”阶段并明确指向搜索与应用商店合规整改不足，意味着后续可能出现强制整改或处罚，从而实质改变相关平台的分发与导流规则及合规成本预期。

opportunities.title: California moves to exempt Linux from its age-verification law after backlash
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable legislative movement (an amendment proposed by the original lawmaker) indicates a material shift in compliance scope for at least one platform (Linux), but the change is proposed rather than finalized and broader technical/market impacts remain contingent on the final statutory and enforcement details.

opportunities.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable market/technical conditions changed for affected actors: a large amount of attack-supporting infrastructure was physically seized and operators arrested, likely disrupting ongoing campaigns and forcing migration; however, no broad new capability, pricing, or access change is evidenced beyond this specific takedown.

opportunities.title: server: fix checkpoints creation by jacekpoplawski · Pull Request #22929 · ggml-org/llama.cpp
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable technical condition change: the PR is merged into main and maintainers report coordinated compatibility work across supported models/parsers; it can materially reduce latency from forced full prompt reprocessing in long-context sessions, though no explicit benchmarks or adoption metrics are provided.

opportunities.title: Exit IP VPN servers mitigation rollout
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable change is a provider-side mitigation rollout for a real-world tracking technique, indicating shifting privacy threat/defense conditions; however, no clear market-wide capability leap or quantified cost/latency/access change is stated in the provided content.

opportunities.title: 腾讯 ima copilot 全量开放，主打个人知识库常驻记忆
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观测变化是产品从灰度转为对所有用户开放，且明确支持调用笔记/知识库并提供分层记忆模块设计；但未披露性能、成本、接入方式（API/插件）、用户规模或生态合作信息，市场与技术边界的量化变化有限。

opportunities.title: 马斯克宣布 Grok V9-Medium 模型训练完成，预计两三周后发布
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察事实是模型已完成训练并给出2-3周的公开发布计划，且提到引入大量 Cursor 数据与从0.5T到1.5T的规模变化，可能带来能力边界提升；但尚无公开评测、定价/接入方式或可验证性能数据，信号中等。

opportunities.title: Magnifica Humanitas
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable facts indicate a prominent institution publishing an ethics/governance document that is drawing major attention, but it does not itself change technical capabilities, costs, access, or regulatory conditions in a concrete way.
